segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens on a brightly lit stage featuring a 'MAM TALENT!' backdrop with dynamic red, purple, and white graphics, as driving electronic music with a strong beat immediately sets an energetic tone. A young man in a military-style outfit, comprising camouflage pants, a green t-shirt, and a tactical vest, performs a highly synchronized act with his tan dog, identified as part of 'DOGS OF ANARCHY' from Wrocław. As the music intensifies with aggressive male vocals, the dog executes a series of precise and energetic trained tricks, including jumping onto the man’s back, balancing on his shoulders, and leaping over his body as he lies on the floor, showcasing remarkable agility and obedience. The man guides the dog with subtle hand signals and body cues, maintaining a strong connection throughout the dynamic routine. Cutaways show the audience and judges reacting with visible amazement and applause, their engagement palpable as the vibrant stage lighting highlights the duo's skill. The judges' expressions range from focused delight to broad smiles, reflecting the impressive nature of the performance. The segment concludes with the man and dog completing a final trick, and as the electronic music abruptly fades, the scene cuts backstage. Here, two men in dark shirts react with disbelief, one of them heard speaking in Polish, commenting on the challenge of teaching such a complex act.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video opens on a brightly lit stage with a large 'MAM TALENT!' backdrop featuring dynamic red, purple, and white graphics, including a city skyline and wind turbines. The dog’s movements are precise and energetic, showcasing agility and obedience. The man guides the dog with hand signals and body cues, maintaining a strong connection. The performance includes moments where the dog lies down calmly, then springs back into action, demonstrating discipline. The audience and judges, visible in cutaways, react with amazement and applause. The judges’ expressions range from focused to delighted, with one judge in a red blazer smiling broadly. The stage lighting remains vibrant, with spotlights highlighting the duo’s synchronized routine. The segment ends with the man and dog completing a final trick, followed by a cut to backstage where two men in dark shirts react with disbelief, one saying, 'Seriously? For real?'—indicating the act’s impressive nature. The overall atmosphere is one of high energy, skill, and emotional engagement.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens on a glossy black stage bathed in vibrant red and purple lights, featuring a 'MAM TALENT!' backdrop with a city skyline. An emotional country-folk song with male vocals, singing "Welcome home, welcome home...", begins to play. A young man, later identified as Alex by a judge, in a military-style outfit, stands center stage with his two dogs, Einstein Brega (tan) and Princess Kira (black-and-white), both wearing red bandanas. He expertly guides them with precise hand signals as they perform impressive tricks, including jumping onto his back, balancing on his shoulders, and leaping over his body, all set to the uplifting music. The audience erupts in enthusiastic applause and cheering as the performance concludes. The judges, visibly amazed, join the applause, with one blue-haired judge in a floral blazer smiling broadly. As Alex holds Einstein Brega and Princess Kira stands beside him, the blue-haired judge praises the act in Polish, stating, "Alex, you know what, there was something so embracing in it, you know, so good, noble," and adding, "One trusts you that these dogs are simply happy with you. And they just listen to you, right? And well, I'm just smiling and I have this feeling that such a nice story happened on this stage, so 'super'." The atmosphere is filled with admiration and warmth, celebrating the profound bond between Alex and his highly trained dogs.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video opens on a glossy black stage under vibrant red and purple lighting, with a large 'MAM TALENT!' backdrop featuring a stylized city skyline and wind turbines. A young man in a military-style outfit—wearing a green t-shirt, camouflage pants, and a tactical vest—stands center stage with two dogs: a tan dog with a red bandana (Einstein Brega) and a black-and-white dog with a red bandana (Princess Kira). The man gives hand signals, and the dogs respond with precision, jumping onto his back and balancing on his shoulders. The tan dog leaps over his body while the black-and-white dog stands atop his shoulders, showcasing their training and agility. The audience erupts in applause, and the judges, seated at a white desk, react with visible amazement—particularly a judge with blue hair and a floral blazer who smiles broadly and raises her hand in approval. The man then holds the tan dog in his arms as the black-and-white dog stands beside him, and the judges continue to applaud. The man speaks into a microphone, and subtitles reveal the judges’ praise: 'Alex you know it felt both dreamy, good and noble' and 'We trust you that the dogs are best happy under your care.' The audience claps enthusiastically, and the judge with blue hair adds, 'I have a feeling that a nice story took place at this stage, 'super'.' The atmosphere is one of admiration and emotional warmth, highlighting the bond between the performer and his dogs.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with Alex, a young man in a military-style outfit, including a green t-shirt, camouflage pants, and a tactical vest, standing on a glossy black stage with a vibrant 'MAM TALENT!' backdrop. He holds a microphone, thanking the audience and judges as applause and upbeat music fill the air. The judging panel, consisting of Małgosia Foremniak in a red blouse, Agustin Egurrola in a beige suit, and Agnieszka Chylińska with blue hair, watches intently. Alex is accompanied by his two dogs, Princess Kira, a black-and-white dog, and Einstein Brega, a tan dog, both wearing red bandanas. The dogs perform impressive acrobatic tricks, jumping onto Alex's back and balancing on his shoulders, eliciting visible amazement and applause from the judges. Małgosia Foremniak, captivated, asks Alex, "Tell me, Alex, do your dogs always look at you like that?" to which he replies, "Brega mostly yes. Kira depends." Agustin Egurrola humorously compares the dogs' gaze to his wife's diet struggles, adding, "You like these dogs and it shows... you show that animals deserve great respect, and for that, I thank you." Małgosia Foremniak describes the act as "friendship, a conversation between a human and a dog, and love." Agnieszka Chylińska presses a red button, indicating a positive vote. As an announcer calls for votes, Małgosia Foremniak declares, "I am a yes," followed by Agustin Egurrola and Agnieszka Chylińska, who both affirm, "I am a yes," concluding the energetic and entertaining performance.
segments.visual_original_caption: The segment opens with a young man in a military-style outfit, including a green t-shirt, camouflage pants, and a tactical vest, standing on a glossy black stage with a large 'MAM TALENT!' backdrop featuring dynamic red, purple, and white graphics. He holds a microphone and speaks to the judges, who are seated behind a white desk. The judging panel consists of three individuals: a woman in a red blouse, a man in a beige suit with a patterned shirt, and a woman with blue hair wearing a floral blazer over a pink top. The audience is visible in the background, clapping and engaged. The man on stage is accompanied by two dogs: a black-and-white dog named Princess Kira and a tan dog named Einstein Brega, both wearing red bandanas. The dogs are initially seen standing calmly beside him, then later performing acrobatic tricks such as jumping onto his back and balancing on his shoulders. The judges react with visible amazement and applause, with the woman in the red blouse asking the man about the dogs' behavior, and the man in the beige suit commenting on the respect shown to the animals. The woman with blue hair presses a red button, indicating a positive vote. The stage lighting is vibrant, with spotlights highlighting the performers, and the overall atmosphere is energetic and entertaining. The on-screen text identifies the act as 'Dogs of Anarchy' and the dogs as 'Princess Kira and Einstein Brega'. The judges express their appreciation for the performance, with the man in the beige suit noting the emotional connection between the man and his dogs, and the woman in the red blouse describing it as 'friendship, the talk between a human and a dog, and love'. The segment concludes with the judges giving their votes, with the woman in the red blouse and the woman with blue hair both saying 'Yes', and the man in the beige suit also giving a positive response.

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with a young man in a military-style outfit on a glossy stage with a 'MAM TALENT!' backdrop, holding a microphone and smiling as judges give a unanimous "Trzy razy na tak!" (Three times yes!). He is possibly heard saying "Chodźcie!" (Come on!) to his two highly trained dogs, Princess Kira and Einstein Brega, who perform dynamic tricks like jumping onto his back and leaping over his body in their 'Dogs of Anarchy' act. The judges praise them in Polish, exclaiming "Co za występ, naprawdę!" (What a performance, really!) and "Byliście świetni!" (You were great!), followed by enthusiastic applause. The scene transitions to a different stage with a blue and purple cityscape backdrop, where a woman, Liv, in a blue blazer and patterned skirt, is greeted by Simon Cowell asking, "Hello there. And who are you?" She introduces herself as "I'm Lynn. And this is little Mojo, my toy poodle," to which Simon responds, "Oh, he's cute." Simon then asks why she decided to enter the show, and Liv explains that Mojo is "a very, very clever talented dog," though she's unsure if "she can do it on a stage." Simon wishes them "good luck," and Liv thanks him amidst audience applause. Liv then announces, "We're going to start off with a banging tune," as upbeat, energetic music with vocal samples like "Let's get ready to rumble!" begins, accompanying Mojo's tricks, such as walking on hind legs and balancing on a star-shaped platform, while the judges, including Simon Cowell and David Walliams, react with visible excitement and the audience cheers.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video opens with a young man in a military-style outfit, including a green t-shirt, camouflage pants, and a tactical vest, standing on a stage with a glossy black floor and a vibrant red and purple backdrop featuring the text 'MAM TALENT!' He holds a microphone and smiles broadly as the judges give a unanimous 'YES' verdict. Two dogs, one black-and-white (Princess Kira) and one tan (Einstein Brega), perform dynamic tricks, including jumping onto his back and leaping over his body, showcasing high training and agility. The act, titled 'Dogs of Anarchy,' concludes with the man receiving enthusiastic applause and a warm embrace from a man in a dark shirt backstage. The scene then transitions to a different stage with a blue and purple cityscape backdrop, where a woman in a blue blazer and patterned skirt performs with a small black dog named Mojo. The dog, wearing a blue collar, performs tricks such as walking on its hind legs and balancing on a star-shaped platform. The judges, including Simon Cowell and David Walliams, react with visible excitement and amusement. The woman, identified as Liv, smiles proudly as the act ends, and the audience cheers. The stage features props like a red gift box and a silver-wrapped car, adding to the festive atmosphere. The segment concludes with the judges giving positive feedback, and the woman receiving a standing ovation.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with an upbeat, rhythmic track featuring vocal samples like 'straight up through' and 'watch us wreck the mic,' as Mojo, a small black dog in a blue collar and white lace-trimmed vest, performs on a glossy stage against a vibrant London cityscape backdrop. Guided by Liv, a woman in a blue blazer and patterned skirt, Mojo executes tricks including walking on hind legs and balancing on a star platform. A male voice exclaims, 'Better than our dance team, that!' Liv, speaking with an enthusiastic and encouraging voice, announces, 'Now, we're going to open some presents,' as Mojo pulls a red cloth from a box. She then playfully addresses Mojo, 'It's a little tiny piano, Mojo! Can you play your piano?' as the dog climbs into a colorful toy piano labeled 'MOJO.' Liv continues to encourage Mojo, 'See? And jump over. Good girl.' The background music continues as Liv introduces the next prop, 'So let's open this big one now. Pull the paper off. Can you get it?' referring to a miniature white convertible car with 'MOJO 1' on its license plate. Liv remarks, 'You lucky girl, even I haven't got a sports car!' eliciting audience laughter, and asks, 'Come on, are you going to hop into this little car?' As Mojo gets in, Liv muses, 'Wouldn't it be fantastic, Mojo, if a handsome hunk took you for a spin in this little car? What do you think? Oh, come on!' The audience reacts with gasps of delight and cheers, 'Oh! Oh!' as Mojo drives the car. Judges, including a woman in a black off-the-shoulder dress and a man in a dark suit, are seen smiling and applauding. Liv concludes with 'There we go. Have a lovely evening,' as celebratory music with vocal samples like 'Rattle along now' swells, marking the end of the charming and precise performance under dynamic blue and purple lighting.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video segment opens with a small black dog, Mojo, dressed in a blue collar and a white lace-trimmed vest, performing on a glossy stage with a vibrant cityscape backdrop featuring London landmarks like Big Ben and St. Paul’s Cathedral. The dog, guided by Liv, a woman in a blue blazer and patterned skirt with blue sneakers, executes a series of tricks, including walking on its hind legs and balancing on a star-shaped platform. Mojo then interacts with a red box, pulling out a red cloth, and later climbs into a colorful toy piano labeled 'MOJO' with musical notes. The performance continues as Mojo drives a miniature white convertible car with chrome wheels and a license plate reading 'MOJO 1', showcasing its training and agility. The audience and judges, including a woman in a black off-the-shoulder dress and a man in a dark suit, react with visible amusement and applause. The stage is illuminated with dynamic blue and purple lighting, enhancing the theatrical atmosphere. The act concludes with Liv and Mojo sharing a moment of connection as the dog sits proudly in the car, while the judges and audience express their delight, capturing the charm and precision of the performance.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens backstage with two men reacting with astonishment and laughter, one exclaiming 'Seriously? For real?' as they watch a performance. The scene cuts to the brightly lit Britain's Got Talent stage, filled with an upbeat, dramatic background music and the sound of an audience cheering and clapping. A male voice excitedly urges, 'Get on the car! The car! The car!' as a small black dog named Mojo, dressed in a blue collar and white lace-trimmed vest, performs a series of tricks. Mojo is guided by Liv, a woman in a blue blazer and patterned skirt, who kneels beside him as he walks on his hind legs, balances on a star platform, and pulls a red cloth from a colorful toy piano labeled 'MOJO'. The dog then drives a miniature white convertible car labeled 'MOJO 1' across the glossy stage, which reflects vibrant blue and purple lights and an illuminated London skyline backdrop. The audience erupts in applause and cheers, with close-ups showing their delighted expressions. The judging panel, including Simon Cowell, Amanda Holden, and Alesha Dixon, reacts with visible amazement. Simon covers his mouth in surprise, while Amanda smiles broadly and Alesha claps enthusiastically. Simon comments, 'You're getting up,' referring to the standing audience, and later suggests, 'That dog could learn how to play the piano.' Amanda declares, 'Your dogs are just adorable,' and Alesha adds, 'I think they should have their own like kids' TV show.' The judges' red 'X' buttons are shown, with Simon and Amanda pressing theirs to give positive votes, followed by David Walliams (not seen) saying he'll say 'yes,' and Amanda and Alesha also confirming 'Yes, yes.' Simon then tells Mojo, 'Okay, Mojo, get into practice,' just before Mojo lets out a distinct bark/howl. Simon concludes, 'Because you got four yeses,' as the audience stands and applauds to celebratory music, and the judges smile warmly, clearly impressed by the charming and well-trained performance of Liv and Mojo, with a host exclaiming, 'Yes! Mojo! Unbelievable!'

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens in a vibrant backstage area, bathed in blue and purple neon lights, where a host in a white shirt playfully interacts with Liv, who wears a blue blazer and patterned skirt. Amidst upbeat celebratory music and crowd cheers, the host exclaims, "Oh yes! Nice work!" as Liv adjusts a large star prop. The host then asks, "Where is Mojo?", explaining, "We've set out what we're going to call the ITV2 setup of your act." Liv, with a clear British accent, responds, "Mhm," and then, "Mojo, 'cause she's resting," before excitedly adding, "Good boy!" as the host reveals a colorful toy piano and a miniature white convertible car, both labeled 'MOJO'. As Mojo performs tricks, pulling a red cloth from the piano and driving the car, the host praises, "Well done! Good boy, well done!" and Liv adds, "And see!" amidst her excited squeals and laughter. The car's engine revs and horn honks, prompting the host to exclaim, "Wow! Pow!" On-screen graphics identify 'LIV AND MOJO'. A brief, distinct male voice is heard saying "Hay que hacerla con champaña" before the scene dramatically shifts to a glamorous stage with an ornate star backdrop. Here, Christian Stoinev, in a black sequined jacket, emerges from a silver box, performing a theatrical act and striking poses to the smooth, jazzy male vocals of a song about feeling good ("It's a new dawn, it's a new life for me, and I'm feeling good"), which transitions into powerful, dramatic orchestral music. Judges watch with visible amazement as on-screen graphics identify 'CHRISTIAN STOINEV' and the show's branding 'PRO-TV' and '#BGMT'.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video opens in a backstage area of a talent show, illuminated with vibrant blue and purple neon lights, metal truss structures, and a large star-shaped backdrop. A man in a white shirt and black trousers, identified as the host, interacts playfully with a woman in a blue blazer, white collared shirt, and patterned skirt—Liv. They are preparing for a performance, with Liv adjusting a large white star prop. The host then crouches to reveal a colorful toy piano labeled 'MOJO' and a miniature white convertible car, both bearing the name 'MOJO'. Liv laughs and gestures excitedly as the host demonstrates Mojo’s tricks, including pulling a red cloth from the piano and driving the car. The scene transitions to a stage with a grand, ornate star backdrop and sparkling lights, where a performer named Christian Stoinev, dressed in a black sequined jacket, white pants, and white gloves, emerges from a silver box. He performs a dramatic, theatrical act, removing his hat and striking poses, while the judges—seated at a white desk—react with visible amazement. On-screen graphics identify the acts as 'LIV AND MOJO' and 'CHRISTIAN STOINEV', with the show's branding 'PRO-TV' and '#BGMT' visible. The atmosphere shifts from playful backstage preparation to a high-energy, glamorous stage performance, emphasizing theatricality and audience engagement.

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens on a grand stage bathed in dramatic blue spotlights, centered around a large ornate star backdrop, as Christian Stoinev emerges from a silver box, dressed in a black sequined jacket, white pants, and white gloves. An upbeat, slightly melancholic pop song with male vocals, singing about a 'new day' and 'new life,' sets the mood as he begins his act by balancing upside down on a narrow, tall silver stand, showcasing incredible strength and flexibility. The audience and judging panel react with visible amazement and applause, with one male voice exclaiming in Romanian, 'Hey, don't tell me he's standing on one finger!' and another adding, 'Tell me he's standing on a single finger, are you crazy?' followed by an incredulous 'Wow! Get out of here!' and 'Woohoo!' sounds. As the performance progresses, Christian removes his jacket to reveal a muscular, shirtless torso, continuing his routine with precision and control. He then transitions to using two crutches, performing handstands and acrobatic moves with them, demonstrating remarkable balance and athleticism. The audience is visibly captivated, with close-ups showing emotional reactions, including tears and wide-eyed wonder, as their applause and cheers intensify. An announcer's voice is heard saying, 'Especially for Andra!' before the performance culminates in a powerful, controlled pose. Christian stands tall, receiving thunderous applause from the crowd and the smiling, clapping judges, clearly impressed by his display of skill and determination, as the pop music continues.

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with Christian Stoinev performing an acrobatic handstand on stage, shirtless and wearing white pants, against a grand ornate star backdrop with sparkling lights, all set to an upbeat, rhythmic electronic music track. He transitions into a dynamic routine, showcasing strength and balance, as the audience begins to applaud and cheer. He then retrieves a small tan dog from a silver box, prompting a female judge to exclaim "Oh!" with laughter, while a male judge comments in Romanian, "Nu mă sării, mă!" (Don't jump me!). The dog, wearing a studded collar, playfully interacts with Stoinev as he performs a handstand, with the dog balancing on his feet. The judges react with visible amazement and applause, with the male judge humorously remarking in Romanian, "Nici mă așteptam la orice, dar nu să iasă un cioban de acolo" (I expected anything, but not a shepherd to come out of there), and the female judge exclaiming "Vai! Doamne!" (Oh! My God!). The stage is illuminated with blue and purple lights, creating a dramatic and theatrical atmosphere, while the audience's cheers and gasps intensify. The performance culminates in the dog confidently standing on Stoinev’s feet during a handstand, drawing further gasps and cheers from the crowd, as the male judge enthusiastically declares in Romanian, "Haide, mă! Ce tare e!" (Come on! How cool it is!) and later, "Vai de mine! Ce tare e!" (Oh my! How cool it is!). The judges, including a man in a brown jacket and another in a black vest, express their delight, while the audience claps and smiles, fully engaged in the spectacle, all underscored by the continuous electronic music and enthusiastic applause.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with Christian Stoinev, a shirtless man with a muscular build, wearing white pants and a black belt, performing an acrobatic handstand on a glossy black stage, illuminated by dynamic blue and white spotlights. An upbeat, electronic dance track with a strong beat immediately sets an energetic tone. A small tan dog, adorned with a studded collar, confidently balances on Christian's feet, prompting a building wave of audience applause and cheers. The dog then jumps down and walks toward a silver box with circular vents, from which it had previously emerged, as a female voice exclaims "Vai, ce drăguț!" (Oh, how cute!) in Romanian. Christian Stoinev transitions into a series of fluid movements, including a backbend and another handstand, while the dog sits attentively nearby. The audience's applause and cheers intensify, and a male voice adds, "Ce micuț îi, mă!" (How small he is, man!). Judges, including a woman in a black sequined outfit with star embellishments and a man in a checkered blazer, are shown smiling and clapping, their reactions mirroring the audience's visible excitement, which includes a playful "Nu vreau, nu mai vreau!" (I don't want to, I don't want to anymore!) and an excited "Aaaah!" from male voices. The performance culminates with Christian Stoinev striking a dramatic pose, arms raised, as the dog sits calmly beside him, and the stage lights flash in sync with the music, which builds to a powerful crescendo, accompanied by roaring applause and cheers from the highly engaged audience. The theatrical and energetic atmosphere is enhanced by the reflective floor and the grand ornate star backdrop with red and gold embellishments.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with a judge, a man with curly gray hair and a beard in a green corduroy jacket, reacting with visible surprise and amusement, as a male voice in Romanian exclaims, "If he lifts it up and the dog stays there in balance, it's something I don't believe." The scene quickly transitions to Christian Stoinev, a shirtless, muscular man in white pants, performing an acrobatic handstand on two metal stands on a grand stage with an ornate star-shaped backdrop. Perched calmly atop his feet is a small tan dog with a studded collar, which had earlier emerged from a silver box. As Christian holds a horizontal pose, the male voice continues, "Well, you saw this too. So you didn't think I'd see this," followed by laughter. Upbeat, dramatic instrumental music with a strong beat begins, accompanied by building audience applause and cheers. The dog then jumps off Christian’s feet as he transitions to a standing pose, holding the dog aloft. Another male voice exclaims, "Well, something like this I really haven't seen on Romania's Got Talent. Incredible, man!" The audience erupts in louder applause and cheers, while the judges, including a woman in a black sequined outfit and a man in a checkered blazer, are visibly delighted, laughing and clapping. The music continues with a female vocalist singing in English, as the audience's cheers intensify. The performance concludes with Christian holding the dog high amidst flashing stage lights, and the audience cheering enthusiastically, punctuated by a judge's "Bravo!" and "Very good!" before a final "Oh my..." as the segment fades.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video opens with a close-up of a judge with curly gray hair and a beard, wearing a green corduroy jacket over a white shirt, reacting with surprise and amusement. The scene quickly shifts to a dramatic stage performance by Christian Stoinev, a shirtless man with a muscular build, wearing white pants and a black belt, performing an acrobatic handstand on two metal stands. Perched atop his feet is a small tan dog with a studded collar, balancing calmly as Christian holds a horizontal pose. The stage is grand, featuring an ornate star-shaped backdrop with red and gold embellishments, illuminated by dynamic blue and white spotlights. The dog, initially emerging from a silver box with circular vents, sits confidently on Christian’s feet, then jumps off as he transitions into a standing pose, holding the dog aloft. The audience erupts in applause, and the judges, including a woman in a black sequined outfit with star embellishments and a man in a checkered blazer, are visibly delighted, laughing and clapping. The performance concludes with Christian holding the dog high, the stage lights flashing, and the audience cheering enthusiastically. The camera captures wide shots of the stage, emphasizing the reflective floor and the star backdrop, while close-ups highlight the dog’s calm demeanor and Christian’s strength and control.
